items.description: Wheat extended a decline as traders took profits, against a backdrop of Black Sea supply risks and weak US export demand.

items.title: Eoptolink Is Said to File for Up to $5 Billion Hong Kong Listing
items.description: Eoptolink Technology Inc., a Chinese maker of optical transceivers, has filed confidentially for a multibillion-dollar listing in Hong Kong, according to people familiar with the matter.

items.title: EM Stocks Headed For Weekly Loss on Tech Selloff, Rising Crude
items.description: Emerging-market equities fell for a second day and are headed for a weekly decline as concerns over stretched AI valuations dragged technology shares lower, triggering a selloff across Asia.

items.title: Hong Kong Stocks’ Discount to China Widens on Liquidity Pressure
items.description: Hong Kong stocks’ valuation discount to their mainland-listed counterparts is widening, driven largely by liquidity strains and Beijing’s crackdowns on capital outflows.

items.title: Industrial Metals Decline as Traders Weigh Fed Rate Outlook
items.description: Base metals retreated on Friday as traders weighed the likelihood of higher interest rates and their negative impact on demand.

items.description: The Reserve Bank of India’s latest measures to attract foreign currency inflows are set to lift optimism when some of the country’s largest private sector banks report on Saturday.

items.title: Chinese AI Stocks’ 1,000%-Plus Profit Gains Fail to Spur Rally
items.description: China’s artificial intelligence companies are poised to deliver robust earnings, but elevated expectations after a months-long rally are raising the bar for tech stocks to climb further.
